NAVAREA 43/24
  1. SOLAR STORM IN PROGRESS FROM 102100 UTC MAY 24. HF COMMUNICATIONS AND GPS POSITIONAL INFORMATION MAY BE DISRUPTED BY THE EFFECTS OF SOLAR FLARES.
 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 120001 UTC MAY 24. NAVAREA 43/24
  1. SOLAR STORM IN PROGRESS FROM 102100 UTC MAY 24. HF COMMUNICATIONS AND GPS POSITIONAL INFORMATION MAY BE DISRUPTED BY THE EFFECTS OF SOLAR FLARES.
 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 120001 UTC MAY 24.
 3. PREVIOUS HF WARNINGS ISSUED NAVAREA XIX 85/23
